page_2_3_opportunity_strategy.description: Posts ranking on pages 2-3 are the fastest path to traffic growth. These pages are already indexed and have some authority but need a push to page 1.

tactics.name: Title Tag Optimization
tactics.action: Review and optimize title tags for top 50 pages by impressions. Include primary keyword early, add power words, keep under 60 chars.

tactics.name: Meta Description CTR Improvement
tactics.action: Rewrite meta descriptions for page 2-3 content. Include call-to-action, unique value prop, and year (2026). Target 150-160 chars.

tactics.name: Internal Link Boost
tactics.action: Identify top 20 highest-authority pages. Add contextual links from these to page 2-3 content to transfer authority.

tactics.name: Content Expansion
tactics.action: For thin page 2-3 content (under 1500 words), expand with additional sections, FAQs, and supporting data. Target 2000-3000 words.

high_impression_low_ctr_strategy.description: Posts with high impressions but low CTR have visibility but fail to attract clicks. CTR optimization can significantly increase traffic without ranking changes.

tactics.name: Title Tag Patterns
patterns: Questions: 'What is...?' matches search intent for informational queries

tactics.name: Featured Snippet Optimization
tactics.action: Structure content with clear H2/H3 headers, definition paragraphs (40-60 words), numbered lists, and comparison tables. FAQ schema already deployed.

tactics.name: Rich Result Eligibility
tactics.additional: Consider HowTo schema for guide/tutorial posts, Breadcrumb schema for navigation

quick_wins.action: Fix 72 alt text issues on existing images
Add comparison tables to 67 posts missing them
quick_wins.impact: Medium - table snippet eligibility + user engagement

quick_wins.action: Submit XML sitemap to Google Search Console
quick_wins.impact: High - ensure all 460 pages are discovered

growing_clusters: Fish Supplies (50 posts - pause and measure)
topical_authority_building.strategy: Deepen existing clusters before expanding to new topics. Aim for 50+ posts per cluster for dominance.

content_gap_analysis.approach: Use GSC query data to identify queries where PetHub appears but doesn't have dedicated content

backlink_acquisition.phase_2: Guest posts on pet industry blogs
backlink_acquisition.phase_3: Resource page link building (pet owner guides)

eeat_signals.current: About Jason page live, author attribution on all posts
eeat_signals.next: Build out author expertise page, add credentials/experience, link to social profiles

Optimize title tags on top 50 pages by impressions
Internal link boost from top-authority pages to page 2-3 content
Expand thin content on page 2-3 rankings

status: READY FOR EXECUTION - Ranked priority actions with estimated timelines
